subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Though thou hast not attained His presence outwardly at this Threshold, yet through the grace and bounty of the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله اگر چه بظاهر در این آستان حاضر نشدی ولی از فضل و موهبت حی قیوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @chastisement and requital
